creator: sv@ulstu.ru
text:
As per the instructions on the "Consulting Services" page (https://www.freebsd.org/commercial/consult_bycat.html) I'm requesting the addition of the "Ulyanovsk.BSD (ULBSD)" on the page. 1. URL: http://www.ulbsd.ru 2. Email Contact: info@ulbsd.ru 3. Description (HTML-ized):

The Ulyanovsk.BSD (ULBSD) is a Russian company located in Ulyanovsk. We provide technical support and consulting to users of ULBSD operating system that is based on FreeBSD. We provide free and paid versions of our operating system. We also answer many questions of users for free and help them work in the FreeBSD and ULBSD. For more information send an email to info@ulbsd.ru or visit the website at http://www.ulbsd.ru/.
